subcodes.first_line: Verily, We were walking in the House on a night of deep gloom and intense darkness, at times gazing upon the vista [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا کنا ماشیا فی البیت فی لیله الدعجاء شدیده الظلماء تاره کنا ناظرا الی منظر
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @accounts of dreams and visions, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
